class.name: FtgPackage
class.summary: Loader for FTG archives (Dark Reign game format)
class.details: Reads FTG archives as used by the Dark Reign (1997, Auran) game. The FTG format stores files in a flat directory with 28-byte filenames and uncompressed data at fixed offsets. When a .ftg bundle is loaded via FS_LoadBundle, every .spr sprite file found in the archive is automatically parsed and added to the project as a SpriteAnimation child object. The .spr format (documented in OpenDR/DrSprLoader.cs) contains a 32-byte header (magic RSPR for regular sprites, SSPR for pre-computed shadows; version 0x0210; nanims, nrots, szx, szy, npics, nsects), followed by a picture-index table, section descriptors, and RLE-compressed per-frame pixel data. All nanims×nrots frames are decompressed into an in-memory atlas (nrots columns × nanims rows, each cell szx×szy pixels) and uploaded as a single kTextureFormatAlpha8 texture. For shadow sprites every opaque pixel is forced to palette index 47. The resulting SpriteAnimation objects are named after the .spr file (without extension) and can be retrieved via OBJ_FindChild and assigned to SKSpriteNode.Animation.
